_translatorNote: Best-effort Kinyarwanda translations. Brand names (The Mall IWACU, Iwacu, menu item brand names) are kept as-is. Please review and refine — anything that feels off can be edited here without touching code.

common.pricesMayVary: Ibiciro bishobora guhinduka. Amafoto ni urugero gusa. Ibicuruzwa byose biri mu rwego rw'ubihabwa.

hero.subtitle: Ibyo Tubafitiye — kurya, kunywa, Ibiribwa, kuruhuka. Bitegurwa mu, akabari, igikoni, na massage ndetse na Souna — byose mur The Mall IWACU.

services.heading: Ibyo umunsi wawe ukeneye byose — mu nzu imwe.
services.intro: The Mall IWACU ni inguni yo wabonamo, amafunguro, ibinyobwa n'ikiruhuko bihurira. Hitamo umuryango.

groceries.title: Ibyangombwa
groceries.description: Ibyangombwa bya buri munsi, n'ibibikwa mu gikoni — guhagarara byihuse, ibiciro bishyizweho, serivisi y'umuturanyi.

bar.title: Akabari
bar.description: Inzoga zikonje zo mu Rwanda, ibinyobwa bidasembuye, divayi na cocktail ya buri munsi — uburyo bworoshye bwo kuruhuka.

kitchen.title: Igikoni
kitchen.description: Amafunguro y'i Rwanda atetse iwacu, brochettes, tilapia, na buffet ya buri munsi — ibiribwa bishyushye.

spa.title: Massage na Souna
spa.description: Massage y'umubiri wose, reflexology, umwuka w'ibyatsi — Massage iruhura, hagarara.

bar.label: Mu Bari
bar.caption: Inzoga zikonje & cocktail ya buri munsi

whyUs.heading: Ibyo Badukundira — kuri buri munsi.
whyUs.lead: Iwacu bivuga "mu rugo," niyo myumvire dushaka — aho munyura mu miryango yacu, ugomba kuyumva ukihagera.

community.title: Umuryango Mbere
community.body: Twubakiye ku baturanyi bacu. serivisi y'ubucuti, ibiganiro by'ukuri.

quality.title: Ubwiza Ushobora Kumva
quality.body: Kuva ku ngufu zifite imbaraga zo kunywa kandi imibereho — ubwiza ni cyo cyiciro kimwe rukumbi tuzi.

convenience.title: Byose ni Hano
convenience.body: Serivisi enye, inzu imwe ishyushye. Hagarara incuro imwe, usohoke n'ibyo wose wakeneye.

location.title: Ni Hafi Y'iwawe
location.body: Byoroshye kudusanga muri Kabeza — hafi cyane twabaye igice cy'ubuzima bwa buri munsi.

testimonials.heading: ibyo abaturanyi bacu tugaburirwa, tunywesha n'ibindi bavuga — buri munsi.
testimonials.intro: Amagambo make ava ku bakiriya basanzwe. Wifuza kongeraho ayawe? Twandikire kuri WhatsApp nyuma yo gusura kwawe.

footer.blurb: kurya, kunywa, kugura, kuruhuka. Byose mu nzu imwe.

menu.title: Menu.
menu.subtitle: Kanda igice. Shaka ikintu. Ibiciro mu RWF.
menu.spaLink: Ushaka Massage n'Ubuzima? Ifite ipaji yayo

book.title: Saba igihe.
book.subtitle: Intambwe enye. Igihe utangira n'irangiriro biva ku serivisi uhitamo. Tuzakwemeza kuri WhatsApp.

step1.title: Hitamo serivisi yawe
step1.subtitle: Buri serivisi ifite igihe cyayo. Hitamo imwe urebe amasaha.

step2.title: Hitamo itariki
step2.subtitle: Gufata bishoboka kugeza ku minsi {days} imbere.

step3.title: Hitamo isaha
step3.noTimes: Nta masaha aboneka — gerageza undi munsi.

step4.title: Amakuru yawe
step4.subtitle: Twemeza igihe cyo gufata kuri WhatsApp. Ongeraho icyitonderwa niba gihari.
step4.name: Izina
step4.hold: Ubusabe bwawe bujya ku itsinda ryacu kugira ngo bwemezwe — igihe gifatwa burundu ari uko twabyemeje. Tuzabikwemeza kuri WhatsApp.

slotReasons.leadTime: Ni kare cyane — bisaba isaha imwe imbere

success.heading: Tugiye kubikwemeza vuba kuri WhatsApp.
success.body: Bika nomero ikurikira — uyivuge igihe itsinda ryacu rizagusubiza.

contact.title: Twandikire.
contact.subtitle: Twiyumvire, tuhamagare, cyangwa twoherereze ubutumwa bugufi.
contact.formIntro: Gufata, gufata mu matsinda, kureba serivisi za massage, cyangwa kutubwira murakaza — dusubiza vuba kuri WhatsApp.
contact.name: Izina
contact.disclaimer: Ubutumwa bwawe buzafungura mu WhatsApp kugirango tugusubize vuba. Nta byo tubika ku rubuga.

about.heading: Ahantu hato hafite ikaze rinini.
about.pullQuote: The Mall IWACU ni muri Kabeza, Kicukiro — byose mu hamwe.
about.pullSupport: Nimba ufata ibyangombwa bishya, unywa ikinyobwa gikonje mu akabari kacu, urya amafunguro y'i Rwanda atetse neza, cyangwa ushaka massage — turabigufitiye, byose kuri The Mall IWACU.
about.story1: Twatangije The Mall IWACU kuko abaturage ba Kabeza bakwiriye ahantu hahuza n'uko umunsi wabo ugenda — kuvana ibyo kurya nimugoroba, kwicara ugaburirwe brochette, gusangira inzoga n'umunezero, hanyuma ukaruhuka muri souna na massage mbere yo gutaha.
about.story2: Buri nguni y'inzu ikora neza: imbuto twebwe ubwacu twagura, igikoni gitemba uko Abanyarwanda babyifuza, akabari kazi ibyo ukunda, n'igice cyatuje cya massage n'umwuka ubuzima bukwiriye cyane.
about.story3: Ntabwo turi chain. Turi inguni. Kandi turishimiye ko uri hano.

quality.title: Ubwiza
quality.body: Kuva ku ibibikwa kugeza kuri serivisi — duhitamo ibyiza, buri munsi.

convenience.title: Biroroshye
convenience.body: Serivisi enye, inzu imwe ishyushye. Hagarara incuro imwe, sohokana ibyo ukeneye byose.

hospitality.title: Ikaze
hospitality.body: Iwacu bivuga mu rugo — niyo nzira twohereza.

about.ownerNote: Turi ubucuruzi bw'umuryango, twishimiye inguni yacu. Niba hari icyo tugomba kunoza kurushaho — ifunguro, serivisi — tubwire. Turakumva, kandi turabyubahiriza.

notFound.subtitle: Iyo paji ntibashije kuboneka. Ariko ibindi byose biri mu nzu birafunguye — fata intebe.

staff.heading: Gahunda za massage
staff.intro: Injira ukoresheje konti yawe y'umukozi urebe gahunda z'icyumweru kiri imbere n'izahise.
staff.notConfigured: Sisitemu ya gahunda ntirakora. Nyiri ubucuruzi agomba kubanza gushyiraho Supabase (reba SUPABASE.md).
staff.fetchError: Ntibyakunze gufungura gahunda. Reba interineti yawe wongere ugerageze.
staff.weekSubtitle: Ibyasabwe byose kuva uyu munsi kugeza ku minsi 7 iri imbere. Kwemeza ni byo bifata igihe — mbere y'aho, igihe gisigara gifunguye ku bandi bakiriya.
staff.pastSubtitle: Gahunda zose z'iminsi {days} ishize, izishya zibanza.

login.title: Kwinjira kw'abakozi
login.error: Kwinjira ntibyakunze — reba imeyili n'ijambobanga byawe.

staff.byServiceSubtitle: Inshuro zemejwe n'amafaranga kuri buri serivisi muri iki gihe.

actions.overlap: Ntibishoboka kwemeza — iki gihe gihuye n'indi gahunda yamaze kwemezwa.

spaPage.title: Spa.
spaPage.subtitle: Massage, ubuvuzi bw'umubiri na steam — ibiciro byose biri hano hepfo. Hitamo serivisi, hanyuma ufate igihe cyawe kuri interineti.
spaPage.ctaHeading: Wabonye serivisi ikunogeye? Fata igihe cyawe.

checkIn.heading: Kwakira
checkIn.intro: Andika abakiriya baje ako kanya wemeze n'abari basabye uyu munsi. Buri serivisi yanditswe hano ibarwa mu mafaranga yinjiye.
checkIn.notConfigured: Sisitemu ntirakora — vugana n'uwakoze urubuga. Ntushobora kwandika abakiriya kugeza ihujwe.
checkIn.error: Ntibyabitswe. Reba interineti yawe wongere ugerageze.

revenue.subtitle: Habarwa gusa serivisi zarangiye — abaje ako kanya n'abemejwe ko baje.
revenue.bySource: Kuri interineti n'abaje ako kanya (uku kwezi)
revenue.note: Serivisi ibarwa iyo yarangiye — yanditswe nk'uwaje ako kanya, cyangwa yemejwe ko yaje ku gahunda yasabwe. Igiciro kibikwa igihe cyo kwemeza.
